sections.heading: Math Interactive in use
sections.body: This interactive math demo pairs sliders with an inline SVG slope visualization so the page demonstrates a manipulable concept.

cards.title: Readout
cards.body: Use the equation panel to connect movement to notation.

sections.heading: Slope controls
sections.body: The controls are local range inputs. This demo keeps the math visible even without a runtime framework.
sections.trustedHtml: slope = rise / run = 4 / 6 = 2 / 3

sections.heading: Check understanding
items: What happens to the line when rise is negative?
Why can run not be zero in this slope model?
Which slider changes steepness more for the same absolute movement?
